card.title: mazer: cross-viewport UI reliability and layout hardening
card.summary: Coordinate mobile safe-area, shared overlay geometry, and browser layout through one no-overlap contract and proof matrix.
card.objective: Make menu, Options, play, and Pause remain readable and operable across phone, browser, PWA, and restored-window surfaces without per-screenshot offsets.
acceptanceCriteria: Every primary Mazer surface has an owner, supported viewport category, and no-overlap contract.
Mobile and browser layout work can be verified independently and together through a shared matrix.
No completion claim relies on desktop-only proof for a phone or restored-window defect.
Physical-device findings remain open until operator screenshots confirm the deployed behavior.
discoveries: The latest production screenshots proved the text-bleed fix was real but left labels too small, Pause half-height, excess scroll dead space, slider/scroll gesture contention, and analog-noise gaps in Smart Steering.
Smart Steering must retain the held cardinal axis through normal off-axis stick noise before the one-tile lane-shift resolver can operate.
nextActions: Obtain explicit production authorization for exact head 8ca79d9a.
Collect physical-iPhone menu, Options, play, Pause, and Smart Steering proof after release.
Keep installed-PWA, native browser-chrome, and maximize or restore endpoints open.
blockers: Production still serves the prior explicitly approved 4984d16c artifact.
Physical-iPhone acceptance for exact head 8ca79d9a has not yet been captured.
evidence: Mazer draft PR #76 at exact head 8ca79d9a843213cecab4eb8bb6963ed2078db603.
Focused verification passed 85 of 85; full verification passed 364 of 364; the directional-intent architecture contract, TypeScript check, and production build passed.
Deterministic 390x844 at 3x menu, Options, play, and Pause capture passed every containment, overlap, scroll, label-fill, height-parity, topology, and console gate.
Canonical-project preview dpl_HAcz3TXAnQUca929gqnzHQ87rH7Y is Ready and team-SSO protected.

entry.headline: PR 76 mobile fit and held-axis Smart Steering are proof-ready
completed: Enlarged status, action, guide, toggle, and slider text with measured padding and visual minimum-fill gates.
Matched active-play Pause to the 62px shared status-panel height and moved the scroll cutoff directly below the title.
Made guide clipping progressive by geometry while removing only complete text rows.
Locked overlay scrolling during Move Speed drags.
Preserved held cardinal stick intent through analog noise so one-tile jogs resolve on all four travel directions.
discovered: Physical production evidence remains the final authority for this phone-facing packet.
next: Promote only after explicit operator approval, then collect physical-iPhone screenshots and feel notes.
blockers: Exact head 8ca79d9a is preview-only pending explicit production approval.
evidence: https://github.com/fawxzzy/mazer/pull/76

card.title: mazer: normalize browser UI layout across viewports
card.summary: Normalize responsive browser geometry and preserve only semantic settings so viewport changes cannot replay stale layout.
card.objective: Recompute all menu, Options, play, and Pause geometry from the active content rectangle while preserving explicit player preferences only.
acceptanceCriteria: Layout-derived geometry is never persisted as player preference state.
A recalculated layout cannot overlap, escape the viewport, or hide essential controls.
Normal reload preserves supported semantic settings with safe migration defaults.
Narrow, wide, phone, and restore endpoints have deterministic evidence.
discoveries: Guide content needs viewport clipping at the rendering layer, while text rows need clean all-or-nothing visibility to avoid chopped copy.
The Move Speed slider must own its active pointer so responsive overlay scrolling cannot consume the same gesture.
nextActions: Review exact head 8ca79d9a through physical mobile Safari after explicit production promotion.
Complete native browser-chrome and maximize or restore evidence.
blockers: Anonymous remote screenshot automation is redirected by Vercel team SSO; protection was preserved rather than weakened.
evidence: Mazer draft PR #76 at exact head 8ca79d9a.
Deterministic 390x844 at 3x capture passed Options/Pause top and bottom scroll endpoints, containment, fade-clearance, reachability, and console gates.
Canonical preview dpl_HAcz3TXAnQUca929gqnzHQ87rH7Y is Ready and serves the same hashed app artifact as the locally captured build.

entry.headline: Responsive overlay scroll and typography contract strengthened
completed: Moved the phone overlay render viewport directly beneath the title.
Added geometry masking with clean text-row visibility.
Added minimum action-label fill and exact Pause/status height gates.
discovered: Vercel team SSO protects preview screenshots but does not block authenticated deployment and artifact readback.
next: Use operator production screenshots for the mobile browser endpoint and retain native restore proof.
blockers: Production approval and physical mobile-browser proof remain pending.
evidence: https://github.com/fawxzzy/mazer/pull/76

card.title: mazer: shared menu and play run status panel
card.summary: Use one responsive menu and play status component for time, Rank or AI Rank, Score out of 100, and Maze level from the correct context.
card.objective: Give menu and active play the same compact status language while keeping score authority traceable to the canonical scorer.
acceptanceCriteria: Menu and play consume the same status-panel formatting and layout contract.
Panel text remains centered, contained, and readable at phone and desktop widths.
Panel width, gap, and play Pause placement satisfy shared viewport diagnostics.
Displayed score is traceable to canonical run-quality data rather than a presentation-only calculation.
discoveries: The physically contained status copy was still undersized relative to its available chrome.
Active-play Pause needs to consume the exact shared status-panel height rather than its former control-size-derived height.
nextActions: Review the enlarged shared status text and equal-height Pause control on a physical iPhone after explicit production promotion.
Consume the finalized canonical 0-to-100 scorer field before completion.
blockers: Physical-phone presentation proof for exact head 8ca79d9a is pending.
Canonical score authority remains a separate non-terminal dependency.
evidence: Shared compact status font increased to 14px and the wide font to 15px with measured fit padding.
The deterministic phone capture and visual diagnostic prove exact 62px status/Pause height parity.
Focused verification passed 85 of 85 and full verification passed 364 of 364.

entry.headline: Shared status text and Pause now use the available phone lane
completed: Increased shared run-status typography while preserving rail clearance.
Made active-play Pause exactly match the shared status height.
Added minimum status-font and height-parity visual gates.
discovered: Presentation proof advanced, but canonical score authority is intentionally unchanged.
next: Collect physical-iPhone presentation proof and continue the scorer-owned dependency separately.
blockers: Production and physical-device review remain pending.
